qben_infra|triangulated_hypothesis|hyp_q.headline: [CRITICAL] Qben Infra AB: Q1 2026 revenue claim REFUTED on both axes.
qben_infra|triangulated_hypothesis|hyp_q.body: Reported continuing-operations revenue of 169 MSEK is grounded in external order flow at only 25% of operating subsidiaries (threshold 50%): 4 confirmed post-acquisition prime contracts across 4 peer-subsidiary hypotheses [1]. Yet the CEO-comment region contains 12 positive-framing tokens against 0 acknowledgement tokens, while revenue declined -13.3% YoY and EBITA margin sits at -26.0% [2] [3]. both derived dimensions refute (revenue_support=refutes, explanatory_slippage=refutes). Two independent axes failing in the same direction is treated as critical even without peer-tap confirms [4].

qben_infra_2024|triangulated_hypothesis|.headline: [CRITICAL] Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS -- claim REFUTED by external evidence.
qben_infra_2024|triangulated_hypothesis|.body: Issuer claim: 'SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS is a specialist in rail signalling and electrification in Norway' [1]. doffin (public_procurement) reports not_found: Doffin returned 0 search hits and 0 confirmed awards for SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS. For a Norwegian state-rail-adjacent specialist this is the canonical registry; absence is a weak-to-moderate refute. Subcontractor chains, private-sector clie [2]. brreg (company_registry) reports confirms: BRREG resolved 'SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS' to orgnr 926465252 'SLAM JERNBANETEKNIKK AS' (match=exact+naics, 8 candidates inspected from the top page; BRREG free-text search reports 433581 dataset entries containing any of the name tokens). Fo [3]. ted (public_procurement) reports not_found: TED returned 0 notices where SLAM Jernbaneteknikk AS appears as a winner. TED carries only EU-directive-threshold awards (~NOK 45M for works); a smaller-scale supplier may legitimately have no TED footprint. This is weaker than Doffin absen [4]. Peer-control evidence confirms that the tap landscape reaches this entity class (taps brreg, doffin, ted returned `confirms` on at least one peer hypothesis) [5].

qben_infra_2024|triangulated_hypothesis|.headline: [INFO] Qben Infra AB (FY2024 standalone attack): Banefjell AS -- claim supported by external evidence.
qben_infra_2024|triangulated_hypothesis|.body: Issuer claim: 'Banefjell AS is an established player in track maintenance, concrete renovation and signal in Norway' [1]. doffin (public_procurement) reports confirms: Doffin returned 4 confirmed prime-contract awards to Banefjell AS, 2 post-acquisition and 2 pre-acquisition. This is consistent with the claim [2]. brreg (company_registry) reports confirms: BRREG resolved 'Banefjell AS' to orgnr 914019087 'BANEFJELL AS' (match=exact+naics, 8 candidates inspected from the top page; BRREG free-text search reports 433577 dataset entries containing any of the name tokens). Founded 2014-07-30 (~11 [3]. ted (public_procurement) reports confirms: TED returned 2 EU-tier prime-contract notice(s) where Banefjell AS appears as a winner (2 post-acquisition, 0 pre-acquisition). TED is the canonical EU-wide public-procurement registry; above-threshold awards here are hard evidence of execu [4].
